title: Cross-Service Trace Correlation (CRM ↔ Drone Shop)
description: Correlates distributed traces across CRM Portal and Drone Shop via shared trace_id. Identifies cross-service request flows, order sync operations, and integration health issues. This is the core 360 monitoring query.
query: 'Log Source' in ('enterprise-crm-portal', 'octo-drone-shop', 'SOC Application Logs') | where trace_id is not null | stats count as LogEntries, distinctcount('service.name') as Services, unique('service.name') as ServiceList, earliest(Time) as FirstEvent, latest(Time) as LastEvent by trace_id | where Services > 1 | sort -LogEntries | head 50
